en-US.win10-first-bookmark-feature-callout-1-s: Firefox helps you find your favorite sites, even if something happens to your device.

de.win10-first-bookmark-feature-callout-1-s: Firefox hilft Ihnen, Ihre Lieblings-Websites zu finden, auch wenn mit Ihrem Gerät etwas passiert.

en-CA.win10-first-bookmark-feature-callout-1-s: Firefox helps you find your favourite sites, even if something happens to your device.

en-GB.win10-first-bookmark-feature-callout-1-s: Firefox helps you find your favourite sites, even if something happens to your device.

fr.win10-first-bookmark-feature-callout-1-s: Firefox vous permet de retrouver vos sites préférés, même en cas de problème avec votre appareil.

it.win10-first-bookmark-feature-callout-1-s: Con Firefox puoi ritrovare i tuoi siti preferiti, anche se il tuo dispositivo dovesse avere dei problemi.
